course.name: Analisis Laporan Keuangan dan Valuasi Sekuritas
course.primary_text: Subramanyam, K.R. Financial Statement Analysis, 11th ed. McGraw-Hill.
course.supplementary_text: Palepu, Healy, Peek. Business Analysis and Valuation: IFRS Edition.

weeks.learning_focus: Framework for financial statement analysis; role of accounting information in capital markets

id_company.name: Unilever Indonesia Tbk
id_company.rationale: Consistent with Week 1; shows reporting environment

weeks.learning_focus: Financial reporting environment; accrual accounting; earnings quality; regulatory framework

articles.title: Financial Ratios, Discriminant Analysis and the Prediction of Corporate Bankruptcy
articles.author: Altman, E.I.

id_company.name: Bank Central Asia Tbk
id_company.rationale: Rich debt/equity structure, bond issuance, complex financing

weeks.learning_focus: Debt vs equity financing; leases; off-balance-sheet items; capital structure analysis

id_company.name: Astra International Tbk
id_company.rationale: Major capex, diverse asset acquisition patterns

weeks.learning_focus: PP&E analysis; intangible assets; depreciation methods; asset impairment; capitalization vs expensing

articles.title: Sector-wise Analysis of Working Capital Management and Firm Performance in Manufacturing Sector of Pakistan
articles.author: Raheman, A.; Qayyum, A.; Afza, T.

weeks.learning_focus: Equity method; consolidation; minority interests; goodwill; intercorporate investment accounting

id_company.name: Telkom Indonesia Tbk
id_company.rationale: Revenue recognition complexity, operating expense structure

weeks.learning_focus: Revenue recognition; operating expenses; income measurement; non-recurring items; earnings persistence

weeks.topic_en: Pre-Midterm Review: Synthesis and Article Discussion

articles.title: Earnings Management During Import Relief Investigations
articles.author: Jones, J.J.

articles.title: The Existence of Inter-industry Convergence in Financial Ratios: Evidence from Turkey
articles.author: Acaravci, S.K.

id_company.name: Various IDX Cases
id_company.rationale: Earnings management examples in Indonesian context

weeks.learning_focus: Synthesis of Weeks 1-6; earnings management detection; cross-industry ratio analysis; exam preparation

id_company.name: Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk
id_company.rationale: Complex cash flow from operations/investing patterns

weeks.learning_focus: Statement of cash flows; direct vs indirect method; free cash flow; cash flow quality analysis

weeks.topic: Analisis profitabilitas dan return on invested capital
weeks.learning_focus: DuPont decomposition; ROE; ROIC; profit margins; asset turnover; financial leverage analysis

articles.title: Cash Flow Ratios as Indicators of Corporate Failure
articles.author: Murty, A.V.N.; Misra, D.P.

weeks.learning_focus: Earnings forecasting; pro forma analysis; scenario modeling; forecasting cash flows and growth

id_company.rationale: P/E, P/B, residual income model application
